hero.badge: The first beat auction platform in France
hero.subtitle: Exclusive instrumentals auctioned by verified beatmakers. Place your bid, grab the beat, and drop your next track.

weeklySelection.title: Beat of the week
weeklySelection.subtitle: Every week, an exclusive beat goes on auction for 7 days. Don't miss your chance.
weeklySelection.comingSoonDesc: The next weekly selection will be announced very soon. Stay tuned!

stats.title: 318 LEGAACY in numbers
stats.subtitle: The beat marketplace shaking up the French music scene

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In 3 simple steps, win the beat of your dreams
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up for free in 30 seconds and access all auctions on the platform.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Listen to beats, choose your license (Basic, Premium, Exclusive) and bid in real time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: You won? Pay online and get your audio files instantly.

why318.title: Why 318 LEGAACY
why318.subtitle: A platform built for artists and beatmakers
why318.verifiedProducersDesc: Every beatmaker is validated by our team before they can sell on the platform.
why318.antiSnipeDesc: The timer extends by 2 minutes if a bid comes in during the final moments.
why318.realtimeDesc: Auctions update instantly powered by Supabase Realtime technology.
why318.securePaymentDesc: Stripe handles all payments. The producer gets 85%, the platform takes 15%.
why318.mobileAppDesc: Install the marketplace on your phone and access your auctions anywhere.
why318.playlistsDesc: Organize your favorite beats into playlists and listen with the built-in player.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to bid?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Join the 318 LEGAACY community and grab exclusive beats directly from the best producers

footer.tagline: The first beat auction platform in France
